human_actions_pending.action: Delete duplicate Datsun — run SQL: DELETE FROM vehicle_makes WHERE id = 2863
human_actions_pending.context: Two Datsun rows exist: id 36758 (jdm_manual, priority 55, keep) and id 2863 (NHTSA DATSUN, priority 55, delete). Both display as 'Datsun' in the wheel causing a React key conflict.

human_actions_pending.action: Run Estima SQL if not already done
human_actions_pending.context: INSERT INTO public.vehicle_models (make_id, model_name, year_start, year_end, is_jdm_only, body_style, source) SELECT id, 'Estima', 1990, 2019, true, 'minivan', 'jdm_manual' FROM public.vehicle_makes WHERE make_name ILIKE 'Toyota' ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING

human_actions_pending.action: DB cleanup — remove Honda motorcycles and consolidate chassis-specific model names
human_actions_pending.context: Honda models include motorcycles (CBR, CRF, etc.) from NHTSA — delete these. Silvia S13/S14/S15 should be one 'Silvia' entry; Skyline R32/R33/R34 → one 'Skyline'. Chassis code goes in Trim field for now, dedicated field later.

decisions.decision: Make + Model pickers converted to drum wheel (same as Year picker)
decisions.rationale: User wanted consistent scroll UX across all pickers

decisions.decision: Other option at bottom of Make and Model wheels opens free-text FreeTextSheet
decisions.rationale: Handles rare/custom makes and models not in DB

decisions.decision: Mileage stored in miles always; km input converted on save via ×0.621371
decisions.rationale: Schema (004_cars.sql) mandates miles storage; JDM import users enter km

decisions.decision: NHTSA import script Step 2 now filters gt('priority', 0) instead of all NHTSA makes
decisions.rationale: Supabase 1000-row default limit was returning only A-B trailer companies, never reaching Toyota/Honda/Nissan alphabetically

decisions.decision: ProtectedRoute wraps all private routes in App.tsx — uses onAuthStateChange
decisions.rationale: Previously unprotected routes silently 403'd on session expiry instead of redirecting to login

decisions.decision: Return individual tournament submissions instead of aggregated decklist from /api/meta/[deckId]
decisions.rationale: Competitive players want real tournament lists to copy, not a statistical average nobody actually played

decisions.decision: Supabase default 1k row limit bypassed via gt('priority', 0) filter on vehicle_makes
decisions.rationale: Alphabetical ordering meant all 12k NHTSA junk makes came first; priority filter gets only the ~80 real car brands

next_action: 1. Run SQL to delete duplicate Datsun (id 2863). 2. Log in to the app. 3. Do end-to-end Add Car test — Year wheel → Make wheel → search for a make → select model → set mileage with mi/km toggle → Next → Place in Garage → confirm car appears in carousel. 4. Then tackle DB cleanup: pull Honda models via SQL, delete motorcycles, consolidate Silvia/Skyline.
context_notes: Dev server runs on port 5174 with --host (accessible from phone). App at ~/Desktop/g-dimension. Supabase project ref: uxqoernfrtgclpneirvc. Auth working. All three picker sheets (Year, Make, Model) now use the same drum wheel pattern. Make wheel has a search bar that filters the ~71 priority makes locally; Other → FreeTextSheet. Model wheel has Other → FreeTextSheet. When a free-text make is entered (no make_id), the model field falls back to a plain text input. The NHTSA script now runs in ~70 seconds instead of 30 minutes. DB has ~71 priority makes + 2839 USDM models + JDM manual models. ProtectedRoute uses getSession + onAuthStateChange — returns null while checking (blank flash), then redirects or renders. GarageCarsPage.tsx no longer has the old PickerSheet list component — replaced by MakePickerSheet and ModelPickerSheet.
